headline: Is Gen Digital (GEN) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Gen Digital's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this article walks through the key numbers that matter. Over shorter periods the stock has been mixed, with a 5.3% gain over 7 days, a 5.1% decline over 30 days, returns of 23.6% decline year to date and 16.3% decline over 1 year, while the 3 year return sits at 22.1% and the 5 year return at 1.8% decline. Recent coverage has focused on Gen Digital's position in the cybersecurity and consumer...
